fileLevelValidation: all records must have the same instrument
all records must have the same sessionDate
all records must have the same tickSize
all records must have the same barPeriodType and barPeriodValue
timestampUtc must be UTC and strictly increasing
high must be greater than or equal to max(open, close)
low must be less than or equal to min(open, close)
high must be greater than or equal to low
prices must align to tickSize where possible
volume cannot be negative when present
records must be local explicit strategy bars, not observation snapshots
records must not contain signal, order, execution, broker, credential, network, watcher, polling, scheduler, position sizing, or quantity fields
explicitRejections: LIVE11B synthetic plumbing bar fixtures unless labelled parser_contract_sample_not_market_real
objects containing signal, order, recommendation, executionIntent, quantity, positionSize, broker, Tradovate, credential, apiKey, websocket, http, polling, scheduler, or watcher fields
